meaning: 鲁西荣[法国南部一地区]
examples: All the walls of Roussillon are red.
Gaston produces the wines both from Bordeaux and Langoudoc-Roussillon.
My 7 navigator and I plan our route east toward the town of Roussillon.
There was so much richness and intensity of flavor in the Roussillon wines that I'd tasted.
Roussillon sits to the west of Perpignan but culturally, it lends itself more to Catalonia than France.
